creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
The p5-Apache port is broken. Furthermore, I believe its name is
misleading. mod_perl is embedded into the Apache server, it is not
just a set of Perl modules which can be used with Apache. Given the
PHP and SSL extensions to Apache are located under
apachexx-extension, I believe we should do the same for mod_perl.

The uuencoded shar below contains my port of apache13-modperl, which
I hope can be used to obsolete the broken p5-Apache port.
